SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository

Class DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
DigSiteSquareRepository
public class DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl extends Object implements DigSiteSquareRepository
Implementation of DigSiteSquareRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>>
    getAllByGridId(long gridId)
    Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
    CompletableFuture<DigSiteSquareState>
    getStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y)
    Retrieves the state of a dig site square by its coordinates asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<List<Long>>
    insertBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares)
    Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Integer>
    update(DigSiteSquare square)
    Updates a single dig site square asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Integer>
    updateBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares)
    Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    updateStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y, DigSiteSquareState state)
    Updates the state of a dig site square identified by its coordinates asynchronously.

  • Method Details

    • getAllByGridId

      public LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>> getAllByGridId(long gridId)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
      Specified by:
      getAllByGridId in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      gridId - Grid ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of all squares in the specified grid.

    • insertBatch

      public CompletableFuture<List<Long>> insertBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      insertBatch in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      squares - Collection of squares to insert.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing list of generated primary key IDs.

    • update

      public CompletableFuture<Integer> update(DigSiteSquare square)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Updates a single dig site square asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      update in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      square - Square to update.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the number of rows updated (should be 1).

    • updateBatch

      public CompletableFuture<Integer> updateBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      updateBatch in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      squares - Collection of squares to update.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the number of rows updated.

    • updateStateByCoordinates

      public CompletableFuture<Void> updateStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y, DigSiteSquareState state)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Updates the state of a dig site square identified by its coordinates asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      updateStateByCoordinates in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      gridId - Grid ID.
      x - X coordinate.
      y - Y coordinate.
      state - New square state.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture that completes when the update is done.

    • getStateByCoordinates

      public CompletableFuture<DigSiteSquareState> getStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y)
      Description copied from interface: DigSiteSquareRepository
      Retrieves the state of a dig site square by its coordinates asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      getStateByCoordinates in interface DigSiteSquareRepository
      Parameters:
      gridId - Grid ID.
      x - X coordinate.
      y - Y coordinate.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the square state, or null if not found.
